title: collection of commands and human teacher(s) teaching/enforcing the commands - this enterprise is what Messiah came to destroy.
body:
Scripture/Torah and scribal priesthood enterprise/ Teacher, Text of commands to perform as an enterprise is doomed to fail.

 Messiah came to destroy the instructor / enforcer model. He supercedes this.

This condemns rabbinical judaism.
This condemns Catholicism .
This condemns protestantism.

Messiah alone is the only Father & Instructor ON EARTH! (via the possessing speaking anointing life giving Spirit of Messiah alone)

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: There is no better way to do this enterprise (against the argument of Christians)

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
The argument of grace us works, and depicting the old covenant as works and the new covenant is grace keeps the teaching and enforcement enterprise going.

It assuages the refusal to let messiah be the only human teacher on the earth,

substance on earth

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
A vague ill-formed view of Holy Spirit fosters  the ability of old enterprise models to keep people from living out that Yeshua is the only human teacher for us on the earth.

The Spirit of Yeshua the Messiah (rightly defined as the only human instructor on the EARTH) is the center of the gospel lived out.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: Yeshua dethroned the human authority chief -instructor / chief-enforcer model by merit of an indestructible life (circa Hebrews)

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: The Torah vs Gospel arguments are central, but they are recouched and repositioned to obfuscate the real target according to Jeremiah 31: humans instructing humans.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
the seat of Moses was never meant to be dethroned or reoccupied by Yeshua. just like the marriage of Yeshua and the church was never meant to get into the Earthly marriage bed of Lee and joshua. the two coexist alongside each other. reflection and substance are not at odds.

the author of Hebrews seems to understand this very well when he says that the Messiah has no right to change the levitical priesthood because he is not a descendant of Aaron nor from the tribe of Levi but rather a descendant of Judah and from the tribe of Judah.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: being entrusted with a body of commands, being responsible to interpret those commands, being responsible to instruct and enforce those commands. this is the Enterprise that the Messiah came to supersede and overrule. when the Supreme Court overrules a lower circuit, the lower circuit does not cease to exist. if there are a bunch of lower circuits that are disconnected, and then a change in the body of organization happens so that there is now a supreme court instituted above those lower circuits, those lower circuits do not cease to exist, they are reconstituted around the Supreme Court that is above them. Yeshua came to attack the command Enterprise this way: by going above their pay grade and forcing them to reconstitute beneath him by going above them. not by destroying them. not by abrogating them.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: does Yeshua share the responsibility of instructing with disciples? according to Matthew 18 He seems to. but this too is tongue-in-cheek. because he possesses each instructor. the entrustment is a partnership between the Holy Spirit of Yeshua and that individual. and so far as that human partner is in step with the spirit that possesses him, he is able to share in the work of instructing the other. to the degree he is not in step with the spirit, he has no right at all to direct another disciple. at no point could one of the 12 try to teach one of the other 12 while you feel it was walking among them.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: at no point could one of the 12 try to teach one of the other 12 while you feel it was walking among them.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
### passage proof messiah came to destroy instructor enterprise
 Matt 23: 7 
 (NASB2020)
 and personal greetings in the marketplaces, and being called Rabbi by the people.
 (THOT)
 (THGNT)
καὶ τοὺς ἀσπασμοὺς ἐν ταῖς ἀγοραῖς καὶ καλεῖσθαι ὑπὸ τῶν ἀνθρώπων ῥαββεί.
 Matt 23: 8 
 (NASB2020)
 But as for you, do not be called Rabbi; for only One is your Teacher, and you are all brothers and sisters.
 (THOT)
 (THGNT)
ὑμεῖς δὲ μὴ κληθῆτε ῥαββεί· εἷς γάρ ἐστιν ὑμῶν ὁ διδάσκαλος, πάντες δὲ ὑμεῖς ἀδελφοί ἐστε.
 Matt 23: 9 
 (NASB2020)
 And do not call anyone on earth your **father**; for only One is your Father, He who is in heaven.
 (THOT)
 (THGNT)
Καὶ πατέρα μὴ καλέσητε ὑμῶν ἐπὶ τῆς γῆς· εἷς γάρ ἐστιν ὑμῶν ὁ πατὴρ ὁ οὐράνιος.
 Matt 23: 10 
 (NASB2020)
 And do not be called leaders; for only One is your Leader, that is, Christ.
 (THOT)
 (THGNT)
μηδὲ κληθῆτε καθηγηταί, ὅτι καθηγητὴς ὑμῶν ἐστιν εἷς, ὁ χριστός.
 Matt 23: 11 
 (NASB2020)
 But the greatest of you shall be your servant.
 (THOT)
 (THGNT)
ὁ δὲ μείζων ὑμῶν ἔσται ὑμῶν διάκονος.
 Matt 23: 12 
 (NASB2020)
 Whoever exalts himself shall be humbled, and whoever humbles himself shall be exalted. 
 (THOT)
 (THGNT)
ὅστις δὲ ὑψώσει ἑαυτὸν ταπεινωθήσεται, καὶ ὅστις ταπεινώσει ἑαυτὸν ὑψωθήσεται.

NASB2020: Copyright (C) 1960,1962,1963,1968,1971,1972,1973,1975,1977,1995,2020 by THE LOCKMAN FOUNDATION
THOT: © Tyndale House Cambridge, 2019, available on licence CC BY-NC-ND 4.0
THGNT: Tyndale House, Cambridge 2017

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
Yeshua did come to institute a supercessionism of sorts, but it was by merit of occupying a seat above the seat of moses so to speak, a seat in heaven , and instituting a higher sanhedrin. he would occupy this seat without vacancy ever again via and by merit of his indestructible life.

the backbone of Israelitism, becoming Judaism, is the process of INSTRUCTION/ TORAH. this process is about commanding and directing via oversight and enforcement of supervised communal praxis.

the supervision and enforcement and directing are supposed to be performed by great ones (in post-exilic times, this is the re-envisioning of the leadership of levites and priests as originally presented in the Torah). Ezra is the instructor/great-one par excellance. a levite, a priest, and a torah scholar who is credited with starting pharasaism, the interpreters/ the expositors.
